layout.asideDescription: Keep your claim verification flow in a secure, fast environment designed for evidence-backed decisions.

login.title: Sign in
login.description: Access your verification panel and keep reviewing texts, claims and evidence.

register.title: Create account
register.description: Sign up and start checking claims with fast signals and FEVER evidence.
register.legalPrefix: By signing up you accept the
register.errorPasswordLength: Password must be at least {{min}} characters long.
register.errorPasswordLowercase: Password must include at least one lowercase letter.
register.errorPasswordUppercase: Password must include at least one uppercase letter.
register.errorPasswordNumber: Password must include at least one number.
register.errorLegalRequired: You must accept the privacy policy and terms to sign up.
register.successMessage: Registration complete. Check your inbox to confirm the account before signing in.

forgot.title: Recover password
forgot.description: We will email you a secure link to reset your access in seconds.
forgot.successMessage: If the email exists, we have sent you a link to reset the password.

reset.title: New password
reset.description: Set a secure password to instantly regain access to your account.
reset.successMessage: Password updated successfully. You can now sign in.
reset.errorInvalidLink: The recovery link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
reset.errorPasswordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters long.
reset.errorPasswordLowercase: Password must include at least one lowercase letter.
reset.errorPasswordUppercase: Password must include at least one uppercase letter.
reset.errorPasswordNumber: Password must include at least one number.
highlights: Recovery token verification when loading the page.
Local validation to avoid weak passwords.
Automatic redirect to login after the update.
reset.bottomText: Want to go back to login?
